params.message: pkill -f 'python server/app.py' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'python3 server/app.py' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'python launcher.py' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'python3 launcher.py' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Servidor detenido'

wmic process where "commandline like '%%server/app.py%%' and name='python.exe'" call terminate 2>nul & wmic process where "commandline like '%%server\\app.py%%' and name='python.exe'" call terminate 2>nul & wmic process where "commandline like '%%launcher.py%%' and name='python.exe'" call terminate 2>nul & echo Servidor detenido

params.html: Pyme Ledger AI detenido correctamente.
